changeSet.author: Oleksandr-Braiko
changeSet.comment: Clean up failed constraint attempts and DATABASECHANGELOG table.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE users DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS uc_user_provider_providerid;
ALTER TABLE users DROP INDEX IF EXISTS uc_user_provider_providerid;

sql.dbms: postgresql, mysql, h2, mariadb, oracle, mssql

changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM DATABASECHANGELOG WHERE FILENAME = 'db/changelog/logs/ch-add-columns-to-users-for-google-oauth2-Braiko.xml' AND ID = 'add-unique-constraint-users-provider-provider-id' AND AUTHOR = 'Oleksandr-Braiko';

changeSet.author: Oleksandr-Braiko
changeSet.comment: Adds the unique index as a partial index (WHERE provider IS NOT NULL) to allow existing NULL data.
